requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——发射要求（EN 55014-1，通过欧洲经济区适用）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——發射要求（EN 55014-1，通過歐洲經濟區適用）

summary.en: Norway has incorporated EMC Directive 2014/30/EU into national law via the EEA Agreement. Heat pumps placed on the Norwegian market must comply with electromagnetic emission limits under this directive. Harmonised standard EN 55014-1:2021 (Electromagnetic compatibility — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission) specifies conducted and radiated emission limits. Standards Norway (SN) publishes the Norwegian adoption of EN standards. Heat pump compressors, motors, and inverter drives are significant emission sources. Grid supply is 230/400 V 50 Hz.
summary.zh: 挪威已通过欧洲经济区协议将电磁兼容指令2014/30/EU纳入国家法律。投放挪威市场的热泵须满足该指令下的电磁发射限值要求。协调标准EN 55014-1:2021（电磁兼容——家用电器、电动工具和类似器具的要求——第1部分：发射）规定了传导和辐射发射限值。挪威标准化局（SN）发布欧洲标准的挪威采标版本。热泵压缩机、电机和变频器是重要发射源。电网供电为230/400 V 50 Hz。
summary.zht: 挪威已通過歐洲經濟區協議將電磁相容指令2014/30/EU納入國家法律。投放挪威市場的熱泵須滿足該指令下的電磁發射限值要求。協調標準EN 55014-1:2021（電磁相容——家用電器、電動工具和類似器具的要求——第1部分：發射）規定了傳導和輻射發射限值。挪威標準化局（SN）發布歐洲標準的挪威採標版本。熱泵壓縮機、電機和變頻器是重要發射源。電網供電為230/400 V 50 Hz。

summary.en: GB 4343.1-2018 (Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household electrical appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission) is China's national adoption of CISPR 14-1. EMC emission testing is included under CCC certification for domestic appliances, conducted at CNAS/CMA accredited laboratories.
summary.zh: GB 4343.1-2018（家用电器、电动工具和类似器具的电磁骚扰特性——第1部分：发射）是中国对CISPR 14-1的国家采标。电磁发射测试纳入家用电器CCC认证范围，由CNAS/CMA认可实验室进行。
summary.zht: GB 4343.1-2018（家用電器、電動工具和類似器具的電磁騷擾特性——第1部分：發射）是中國對CISPR 14-1的國家採標。電磁發射測試納入家用電器CCC認證範圍，由CNAS/CMA認可實驗室進行。

gap.en: Although GB 4343.1-2018 and EN 55014-1:2021 share a common CISPR 14-1 lineage, Chinese CCC test reports under GB 4343.1 are not accepted as evidence of conformity with the EMC Directive as implemented in Norway via EEA. Re-testing to EN 55014-1:2021 at a recognised laboratory is required, along with a new EU/EEA Declaration of Conformity. Norwegian market surveillance is conducted by DSB.
gap.zh: 尽管GB 4343.1-2018和EN 55014-1:2021同源于CISPR 14-1，但基于GB 4343.1的中国CCC测试报告不被接受为挪威通过欧洲经济区实施的电磁兼容指令合规证明。需在认可实验室按EN 55014-1:2021重新测试，并出具新的欧盟/欧洲经济区符合性声明。DSB负责挪威的市场监督。
gap.zht: 儘管GB 4343.1-2018和EN 55014-1:2021同源於CISPR 14-1，但基於GB 4343.1的中國CCC測試報告不被接受為挪威通過歐洲經濟區實施的電磁相容指令合規證明。需在認可實驗室按EN 55014-1:2021重新測試，並出具新的歐盟/歐洲經濟區符合性聲明。DSB負責挪威的市場監督。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (EMC Directive via EEA — CE marking required for Norwegian market)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (CCC certification includes EMC emission testing)

source.publisher: DSB — Direktoratet for samfunnssikkerhet og beredskap

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gap — re-testing to EN 55014-1:2021 required for Norwegian/EEA market; GB 4343.1 CCC test reports not accepted as conformity evidence under EMC Directive as implemented in Norway.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在差距——进入挪威/欧洲经济区市场需按EN 55014-1:2021重新测试；GB 4343.1 CCC测试报告不被接受为挪威实施的电磁兼容指令合规证明。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在差距——進入挪威/歐洲經濟區市場需按EN 55014-1:2021重新測試；GB 4343.1 CCC測試報告不被接受為挪威實施的電磁相容指令合規證明。

requirement_topic.en: EMC — Immunity and Power Quality for Variable-speed Heat Pumps (EN 55014-2 / EN 61000 Series)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——变频热泵的抗扰度与电能质量（EN 55014-2 / EN 61000系列）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——變頻熱泵的抗擾度與電能品質（EN 55014-2 / EN 61000系列）

summary.en: EMC Directive 2014/30/EU, applicable in Norway via EEA, covers immunity as well as emissions. EN 55014-2:2021 specifies immunity requirements for household appliances. EN 61000-3-2 limits harmonic currents injected into the public supply network. EN 61000-3-3 limits voltage fluctuations and flicker. Variable-speed compressor drives in modern heat pumps are particularly relevant. Norway's 230/400 V 50 Hz grid applies. Conformity assessment is via manufacturer self-declaration with a Technical File; no mandatory third-party body, but test evidence must be retained.
summary.zh: 通过欧洲经济区在挪威适用的电磁兼容指令2014/30/EU同时涵盖抗扰度和发射。EN 55014-2:2021规定家用电器的抗扰度要求。EN 61000-3-2限制注入公共电网的谐波电流。EN 61000-3-3限制电压波动和闪烁。现代热泵中的变速压缩机驱动尤为相关。挪威电网为230/400 V 50 Hz。合规评估通过制造商自我声明并附技术文件进行；无强制第三方机构要求，但须保存测试证据。
summary.zht: 通過歐洲經濟區在挪威適用的電磁相容指令2014/30/EU同時涵蓋抗擾度和發射。EN 55014-2:2021規定家用電器的抗擾度要求。EN 61000-3-2限制注入公共電網的諧波電流。EN 61000-3-3限制電壓波動和閃爍。現代熱泵中的變速壓縮機驅動尤為相關。挪威電網為230/400 V 50 Hz。合規評估通過製造商自我聲明並附技術文件進行；無強制第三方機構要求，但須保存測試證據。

summary.en: GB/T 17625.1 (harmonic current emissions — national adoption of IEC 61000-3-2), GB/T 17625.2 (voltage fluctuations — national adoption of IEC 61000-3-3), and GB/T 4343.2-2020 (immunity — adoption of CISPR 14-2) are the Chinese equivalents. These share IEC/CISPR lineage with the EU harmonised standards but Chinese test reports are not accepted for EEA/Norwegian market conformity.
summary.zh: GB/T 17625.1（谐波电流发射——IEC 61000-3-2国家采标）、GB/T 17625.2（电压波动——IEC 61000-3-3国家采标）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（抗扰度——CISPR 14-2采标）是对应的中国标准。这些标准与欧盟协调标准同源于IEC/CISPR，但中国测试报告不被接受用于欧洲经济区/挪威市场合规。
summary.zht: GB/T 17625.1（諧波電流發射——IEC 61000-3-2國家採標）、GB/T 17625.2（電壓波動——IEC 61000-3-3國家採標）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（抗擾度——CISPR 14-2採標）是對應的中國標準。這些標準與歐盟協調標準同源於IEC/CISPR，但中國測試報告不被接受用於歐洲經濟區/挪威市場合規。

gap.en: Separate conformity assessment for Norway/EEA is required. Existing Chinese immunity and power-quality test reports do not substitute for Technical File evidence under the EMC Directive as implemented in Norway. A new Declaration of Conformity must be issued covering all applicable EMC requirements.
gap.zh: 需要独立的挪威/欧洲经济区合规评估。现有中国抗扰度和电能质量测试报告不能替代挪威实施的电磁兼容指令下的技术文件证据。须出具涵盖所有适用电磁兼容要求的新符合性声明。
gap.zht: 需要獨立的挪威/歐洲經濟區合規評估。現有中國抗擾度和電能品質測試報告不能替代挪威實施的電磁相容指令下的技術文件證據。須出具涵蓋所有適用電磁相容要求的新符合性聲明。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (EMC Directive via EEA — self-declaration with Technical File; DSB market surveillance)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gap — separate conformity assessment required for Norway/EEA; existing Chinese test reports do not substitute for EMC Directive Technical File evidence; DSB conducts market surveillance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在差距——挪威/欧洲经济区需要独立的合规评估；现有中国测试报告不能替代电磁兼容指令技术文件证据；DSB负责市场监督。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在差距——挪威/歐洲經濟區需要獨立的合規評估；現有中國測試報告不能替代電磁相容指令技術文件證據；DSB負責市場監督。
